Learned from form: 'How would you rate your communication and stakeholder engagement skills? (Scale of 1–5)' = '4'

Learned from form: 'Why Do You Want to Join Our Company?' = 'tI am excited about the opportunity to join Eurofins as a .Net Core Developer, leveraging my skills in C#, .NET Core, and Angular to contribute to the company's success. My experience as a Senior .NET Developer at LTIMindtree has given me a strong foundation in designing and implementing scalable, microservices-based applications using CQRS, Docker, and RabbitMQ. I am particularly drawn to Eurofins' commitment to innovation and customer satisfaction, and I believe my skills and experience'
Learned from form: 'Have you completed any relevant certifications or training programs? Please list them.' = 'No information available.'

Learned from form: 'Please list the primary technologies you’ve worked with and mention any advanced or latest versions used (e.g., .NET 6, Angular 15, Python 3.11, etc.).' = '.Net all the Versions and Angular 16 and 18'
Learned from form: 'Which tools, platforms, or technologies are you proficient in? (e.g., Jira, GitHub, MS Project, AI tools, etc.)' = 'Jira, Github, Copilot, Chatgpt codex'

Learned from form: 'Have you worked on both small-scale and large-scale projects/products? Please provide examples.' = 'I have worked on both small-scale and large-scale projects/products.   As a Senior .NET Developer at LTIMindtree, I have worked on multiple projects, including a large-scale project for Deloitte, where I was responsible for designing and implementing a scalable microservices architecture using .NET Core, Angular, and Azure services. This project involved developing multiple APIs, integrating with Azure services, and deploying the application on Azure App Services.  On the other hand, I have also worked on small-scale'
Learned from form: 'Have you managed teams before? If yes, what was the team size and structure?' = 'Yes'
Learned from form: 'What is your expected total annual compensation (CTC)?' = '20 LPA'
Learned from form: 'What is your current total annual compensation (CTC)?' = '11.5 Lakh per annum'
Learned from form: 'If you are serving notice, what will be your official last working day?' = 'August 14 2026'
Learned from form: 'Are you open to relocation or travel for work? If yes, please specify preferred cities and zones (e.g., South Bangalore, East Bangalore, etc.).' = 'Yes'
Learned from form: 'Where are you currently based?' = 'Coimbatore,TamilNadu'
Learned from form: 'Please specify your highest completed degree (e.g., B.Tech, M.Tech, MBA, MCA, etc.).' = 'B.E. Electronics & Communication EngineeringI'
Learned from form: 'How many years of experience do you have in the role you're applying for (e.g., Development, Project Management, QA, etc.)?' = '4'
Learned from form: 'How many years of professional experience do you have?' = '4'
Learned from form: 'Please enter your full name.' = 'Siva Shankar V'
